occupation: Chief Executive Officer at SAB Marketing Connections
headline: Global Chief Executive Officer | Global Network of Offices Builder | Trend Setter l Always Innovating l Digital Advertising Expert l Family Business Board Memberl Fractional CEO l Advertising global winner
summary:
Visionary global executive with 20+ years leading growth, innovation, and transformation across the media, marketing, and communications industries. I have built and revitalized global agency networks, pioneered digital and AI-driven solutions, and driven multimillion-dollar growth across the Americas, Europe, and Asia.

Former Global CEO at WPP, IPG Mediabrands, and Dentsu Media, and current Founder and CEO of SAB Marketing Connections — a multinational network awarded Network of the Year 2023 by Campaign Magazine. Passionate about leveraging technology, data, and creativity to future-proof businesses and empower brands in an evolving world.

I specialize in:

Executive leadership and board advisory
Fractional CEO and Non Executive Chairman
Business expansion and M&A strategy
Digital transformation and AI innovation
Multicultural and international market development
Global Business Connector
Today, I help organizations navigate change, capture new opportunities, and accelerate sustainable growth on a global scale.
Always looking to connect with leaders, innovators, and companies aiming to build the future.

experiences.title: Chief Executive Officer
experiences.description:
We offer marketing and communications consultancy services that include value connections through an extensive global network across Europe, U.S and Latin America; digital transformation, marketing, advertising, data and insights; media, agency and commerce solutions. 

➢ Industry recognition: Rosario University and Dinero Magazine in Colombia “Businessman of the Year” (2017); Honored by Colombian President and Nobel Peace Prize Winner Juan Manual Santos as “Top 100 Colombians Working Outside the Country.”

experiences.title: CEO Media Latin America
experiences.description:
This role gave me the opportunity to build the Latin America network in the highly competitive market while leading 5 media agencies (Carat, iProspect, Vizeum, Dentsu X and Navegg) across 22 countries. 

Notable achievements: 
➢ Defined vision and leveraged industry expertise and extensive network to win major accounts while creating the infrastructure to position the organization for growth. 
➢ Boosted the number of invitations to pitch value proposition 100%.
➢ Account wins: Mastercard, Ferrero, Heineken aligned at regional level.

experiences.title: Global Chief Executive Officer
experiences.description:
As senior executive, I led transformation of the world’s leader in Out-Of-Home (OOH) advertising from traditional media buyer to innovator through technology. I directed a highly diverse team with members across 5 continents, including China, India, Singapore, Sweden, US, UK, Spain and Colombia. 

Notable achievements: 
➢ Praised as the first advertising agency to connect traditional media to digital through mobile phones. 
➢ Launched “Active Journeys” merging contextual and consumer data to reach moving audiences across all touch points. 
➢ Led Kinetic Worldwide in receiving a Specialized OHH Advertising Award in major global festivals (2016).

experiences.title: President World Markets IPG Mediabrands
experiences.description:
GLOBAL CEO, BPN Media Agency │ COO, Initiative Agency Worldwide │ PRESIDENT, World Markets for Initiative, UM Media Agencies 

I was initially hired as Global Managing Director for Initiative Media and took on an expanded role that included leadership of UM and BPN agency brands. Oversaw multiple offices across 50+ countries (large and small markets) and affiliates across 5 continents.

Notable achievements: 

➢ Strengthened processes, network and reputation, positioning Initiative as a Top 5 global media agency. 
➢ Created the BPN Media Agency that went on to win 15+ global awards, including the Grand Prix at the Internationalist Innovation awards for creativity in connecting brands with social responsibility.
➢ Industry recognition: Ad Latina – “Magazine Advertising Executive of the Year in Latin America” (2012); Ad Latina – “One of the 20 Most Influential People of the Decade in the Advertising Business in Latin America” (2010) and “The Most Powerful Latino in the Media Industry Business” (2009).

experiences.title: Managing Director Initiative Worldwide
experiences.description: Re build the agency as global network, modernize product and re positioning the agency to compete globally. Initiative today is one of the most successful media agencirs in the world.

experiences.title: Chief Executive Officer Latin America
experiences.description:
OMD Media Agency Latin America │ PRESIDENT, OMD’s Worldwide Creativity Council │ BOARD OF DIRECTORS, OMG WW  2002-2009

Drove consistency within the OMD Media Agency network in Latin America, positioning region to win global accounts and continue to grow.

Notable achievements:
➢ Solidified OMD as a regional leader, moving from #7 to #3 ranking.
➢ Secured major accounts that included J&J, Visa, McDonald’s, Nokia, BDF and GSK.  
➢ Industry recognition included the Grand Prix in the Cannes Advertising Festival and 12 Lions.

experiences.title: President Andean Region
experiences.description: •	Launched Mindshare in Colombia, Venezuela, Ecuador and Peru.

experiences.title: Director Media Services Latin America
experiences.description:
•	Led implementation of electronic audience measurement services (people meters) in 7 countries for the World’s largest marketing and media research company; a first in Latin America.
•	Established new company in Ecuador as first country manager.

accomplishment_projects.title: Sugar Heart
accomplishment_projects.description: Advertising campaign to change image of Sugar Cane cultivators in Colombia while contributing to improve living conditions of the community around cultives, with education, sports, environmental improvement and peace.

volunteer_work.title: Volunteer
volunteer_work.description: I lead the world largest collection of free space for this organization to create WE DAY's campaign: 1 like = 1 dollar, collecting more than 30 million dollars in free media space and more than 3MM likes in its Facebook fan page that were converted in 3MM dollars in cash by sponsors. Since then I have supported this causes with global advertising campaigns every year.

volunteer_work.title: Volunter
volunteer_work.description: I led with zero budget and only the power of human connection, a coalition of independent agencies that created a national campaign that brings wounded veterans back to life, emotionally, physically, and spiritually. SAB Marketing Connections, in partnership with creative agency Reslen Ideas and with the valuable support of Outfront Media and Adsmovil, has launched a pro bono digital campaign to raise awareness about the work of Wake for Warriors, an organization that provides healing and community to wounded veterans and their families through water sports like wakeboarding and wake surfing. Donated premium digital space across 1,200+ locations nationwide • 4 weeks campaign • Delivered 5,000,260 impressions with optimized pacing • Reached 2.5–3 million people across key U.S. markets • Amplified the mission of Wake For Warriors, helping veterans heal through wakeboarding and community Results: Web Traffic • Total Visits: 4,771 (+72% YoY) • Unique Visitors: 4,300 (+110% YoY) • Pageviews: 6,200 (+23% YoY) • QR Landing Page: 3,273 views, average time on page 3:20 Engagement & Conversions • Form Submissions: 55 • Button Clicks: 323 Donations • Total Raised: $4,340 • Supporters: 22 • Transactions: 23 (+5%
